title: Flaky Nostalgic Egyptian Herbs Crumble
description: A vegetarian-friendly and nostalgic dish featuring tabasco sauce to add a kick of spice. Perfect for breakfast or as an appetizer.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as parsley, cilantro, and dill

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine olive oil, flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir until mixture is crumbly.
Add tabasco sauce and enough vegetable broth or water to form a dough-like consistency.
Transfer the dough onto a floured surface, knead gently for about 2 minutes, then roll it out into a thin layer.
If using fresh herbs, mix them with the dough before rolling. Sprinkle generously on top of the crumble mixture, pressing gently into the dough.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
